query:
SELECT p.id,
       p.productCode,
       p.poNumber,
       p.batchNo,
       p.serialNumber,
       p.imei,
       p.productName,
       p.vendorName,
       p.importedCategoryName,
       p.importedBrandName,
       c.categoryName,
       c.subtypeCode,
       c.brandName,
       p.sheetRowNumber
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_categories c ON c.id = p.categoryId
WHERE p.batchNo = '01900000012'
LIMIT 1;

       c.categoryName,
       c.subtypeCode,
       c.brandName,
       p.sheetRowNumber
FROM products p
